title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 66.360 - City cigarette tax abolished if county cigarette tax levied
text:
66.360.  City cigarette tax abolished if county cigarette tax levied. — In the event such county levies such a tax no incorporated municipality located within such county shall levy a tax on the sale of cigarettes made of tobacco or any substitute for tobacco sold within the limits of the municipality.
(L. 1967 1st Ex. Sess. p. 872 § 3)
